top_patterns.description: Expresses thankfulness or reflection, often with a personal touch.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: frequently in personal moments or achievements
example_quotes: 2016 is the year of #gratitude. @toms
Leaving Colombia today with a full heart, there is nothing like a day spent giving shoes and playing with the kids. #grateful

top_patterns.description: Describes a specific event or activity, often with location or participants.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: during trips, events, or moments of engagement
example_quotes: Hitting balls between @justintimberlake and @jordanspieth in prep for Saturday round @attproam
Love it when archery becomes part of a shoot with @john_urbano and @heathermycoskie

top_patterns.description: Encourages participation, awareness, or support for causes or initiatives.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: when promoting campaigns or social causes
example_quotes: Take the pledge to #JoinTheHerd, make history together and STOP the ivory trade.
Call all social entrepreneurs! Have you explored the @TOMS Social Entrepreneurship Fund?

top_patterns.description: Shares personal or family experiences, often with emotional tone.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal note + location or activity + hashtags
top_patterns.when_it_appears: during family or personal travel moments
example_quotes: Me and the little guy walking down #2 and @pebblebeach for the @attproam practice round
And summit has chosen his favorite in the quiver too.
2016 is the year of #gratitude. @toms
Leaving Colombia today with a full heart, there is nothing like a day spent giving shoes and playing with the kids.
Hitting balls between @justintimberlake and @jordanspieth in prep for Saturday round @attproam
Love it when archery becomes part of a shoot with @john_urbano and @heathermycoskie
Take the pledge to #JoinTheHerd, make history together and STOP the ivory trade.
Call all social entrepreneurs! Have you explored the @TOMS Social Entrepreneurship Fund?

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences with occasional longer reflections
language_habits.line_break_style: Often no line breaks, sometimes breaks after key phrases or hashtags

example_quotes: 2016 is the year of #gratitude. @toms
Leaving Colombia today with a full heart...
Hitting balls between @justintimberlake and @jordanspieth...
Love it when archery becomes part of a shoot...
Take the pledge to #JoinTheHerd...
Call all social entrepreneurs!...

anti_patterns: Repetitive phrases like 'great day' or 'amazing experience'
Too many mentions in one caption
Lack of personal voice or emotional framing

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice emphasizes personal connection, social impact, and shared experiences with a casual, engaging tone.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more explicit advocacy and storytelling, less focus on generic motivational lines.
